rules.name: Mesh name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Mesh name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Consistent mesh naming helps rigging, lighting, and farm automation find geometry reliably across shots and departments.

rules.name: Group name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Group transform name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Predictable group naming keeps hierarchy exports, selectors, and publish manifests stable for downstream tools.

rules.name: Material name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Material name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Material naming conventions prevent accidental reuse of the wrong shader network during lookdev handoff and farm renders.

rules.name: Control name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Control name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Rig controls with consistent prefixes are easier to filter, mirror, and validate before animation publish.

rules.name: Texture node name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Texture file name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Texture file naming keeps published assets searchable on disk and aligned with the Maya file node path and studio manifests.

rules.name: Shading engine name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Shading engine name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Shading engine naming keeps assignment exports aligned with lighting templates and material manifests.

rules.name: Camera name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Camera name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Consistent camera naming keeps shot exports, farm renders, and playblast automation aligned with studio manifests.

rules.name: Light source name must match studio naming template
rules.message: Light source name does not match the studio naming template.
rules.why: Consistent light naming helps lighting templates, farm exports, and automated scene cleanup target the right sources.
